---
title: "Editing A List"
---

The modifications made to the lists in the Administration interface are available in the Scan and Import and Verifier interfaces only when the batch with the updated list field is re-opened.

To edit a list:

1.  From the Hyland Experience Capture Administration user interface, click the Lists tab.
2.  Select the list to be edited. The configurable options for the list are displayed.    ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
3.  Edit the Display Name for the list.
4.  Edit the Description of the list.
5.  You cannot edit the Data Type of a list after it is saved.
6.  In the Add List Items box, edit the list items.
- To filter the list items displayed, in the Search field, enter a string of characters contained in the name of the list you want to select.
- To change how the list items are organized, select the appropriate option from the Sort By drop-down list.The list items appear in the list in the same order in which they were added.Note: The value format of the list items must match the specified data type of the list.
7.  Click Save.
